# terrible_inspur_ispim_edit_snmp_trap (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `auth_password` (String) Set auth password of V3 trap, password is a string of 8 to 16 alpha-numeric characters. Required when *auth_protocol* is either `SHA` or `MD5`.
- `auth_protocol` (String) Choose authentication.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `community` (String) Community of v1/v2c.
- `contact` (String) Set contact, can set NULL. Only the M5 model supports this parameter.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `engine_id` (String) Set Engine ID of V3 trap, engine ID is a string of 10 to 48 hex characters, must even, can set NULL.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `event_severity` (String) Event Severity.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `location` (String) Set host Location, can set NULL. Only the M5 model supports this parameter.
- `os` (String) Set host OS, can set NULL. Only the M5 model supports this parameter.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `priv_password` (String) Set privacy password of V3 trap, password is a string of 8 to 16 alpha-numeric characters. Required when *priv_protocol* is either `DES` or `AES`.
- `priv_protocol` (String) Choose Privacy.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `system_id` (String) Set system ID, can set NULL. Only the M5 model supports this parameter.
- `system_name` (String) Set system name, can set NULL. Only the M5 model supports this parameter.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `trap_port` (Number) Set SNMP trap Port(1-65535). Only the M5 model supports this parameter.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `v3username` (String) Set user name of V3 trap.
- `version` (Number) SNMP trap version,1 is v1,2 is v2c(v2),3 is v3,0 is disable snmp trap. Only the M6 model supports `0` Settings.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `message` (String) Messages returned after module execution.
- `state` (String) Status after module execution.
